TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: dadangoyan Maraod to ko saka 4 a folad tangasa i saka 6 a folad to mihecahecaan, pifotingan to kakahong no pasawali a pangcah koni a "dadangoyan". Orasaka, itiya ho misanga' to dadangoyan o tadatata'akay a demak no niyaro koni, nano to'as a rayray ko taneng a misanga'. Itiya ho misanga' to dadangoyan, o mama ko pasifana'ay to wawa, o mama ko papasifana' to taneng a mikadot, anini sato i, o selal to ko pasifana'ay to taneng mikadot. Nano to'as o paniyaro' an no Pancah i, midoedo to kasa'alo no lotok nai Kalingko tangasa i Posong ato mililisay to riyar masaniyaro'ay. Maro'ay i pasawali a Pangcah i, misiikor to lotok misi'ayaw to riyar, mingata to Tay-pin-yang, orasaka o Pangcah hananay, caayay ka edeng o i Fotoday ko iraay ko pariyaray a serangawan. o Pangcah to i, o manmaan saka'orip, kakaenen, sakalali'aca maemin milecad to talihocan. Nika, o Pangcah han mafana' miala to 'aol, mato misaloma', tayhaw, sasoni a sapengpeng, halo "dadangoyan " sakatayal a ma'orip maemin mafana' miala to 'aol malo sakatayal a lalosidan. ano tooren ko pifoting to rayray, o mililisay to riyar o tada saka'orip ko pifoting a demak, saka caayay ko sasawaden ko lisin no pifoting a demak ato foting to. Misanga' to dadangoyan Maala ko cecay a folad ko pisanga' to cecay a dadangoyan, tosa, tolo miheca mafalicen to. Misanga' to dadangoyan, i'ayaw no cecay a miheca, talalotok ko fa'inayan mipili' to mowatik ato fitonay a 'aol, papolong sa miala to matatodong a panokay, ta patatodong han miketon ta lafongen i tafok mi'icang sakaca ka ngela', caka fao. pinapina to a folad, alaen to i tafokan, o po'ot ko sapipodac, roma a niyaro sapikayangan mili'akong, no telang ho ko taneng, dohdohan a mitarang, sarara sa, tatiih tata'ak ko namal, patatodongen kalamkamen, sakaca ka todoh masiyaw. saikoray to satisil han to mitelek, o 'oway ko safalod, roma sato miala tokilang no kamoraw malosakadot. pacefong to dadangoyan tanamed misakadokadot, ano caka tatodong o nengneng o fana' a miselic, mato pakafitan to sakadot, tahiraen to nika fangcaal to misakadokadot ko pisalof. pacefong Maherek masanga' ko dadangoyan, ira ko pasalong pacefong a lekakawa. Tinako to itiniay i Torik no Pasong a niyaro', pinaherek a dadangoyan itira i riyar no Torik a pacefong, ala sa to limaay a fatac no talod falodhan malofawahan, saycomod patelien ko cecay a talod, ka'ayaw i sota patelien ko tamako ato 'icep sapato'aya, sarakat o Tomok ko mamikerid to kalas mifetek misaali nanay lihaday ko pacefong, makadofa ko kinayra a foting, oya misangaay toya dadangoyan a tamdaw hacecacecay sa micomod toya fawahan, todongay to mifalah toya kaacekan a demak, tatiih misiikor a minengneng. Pakayni tonini pisalongoc to to'as, o kawas no riyar ato kawas no lotok palemeden koni pacefong ato adihay ko foting. Ano haratengen, caka samaan ko pisanga' to dadangoyan, nika mikadot sato i caay ko kahemaway, nawhan kahemaw mahakelong no tapelik a masonol, ano awaay ko taneng ato nafanafan'an i, caay kafilo a mikadot, aniniay sato no soka to ko sapisanga', awaay to ma'araw ko no 'aol, Onini to ko sakalahedaw ko taneng ato pacefong a marayray ko demak, itini i pasawali i Kakacawan no Posong i 2005 a mihecaan pasangen a palowad no tata'akay a pitilidan no siyako, palowad to malalifetay mi'iwas to dadangoyan, paytemek sa ko kasaniyaro' a misanga' to dadangoyan, lacecay sa patalahekal to taneng, nanay toni kalalifet, maparayray ko taneng, ko pisanga' to dadangoyan ato pacefong, maparayray ko tadaheci no serangawan.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan marao~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ taŋasa i saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan, pifo~utiŋan to~u kakaħo~uŋ no~u pasawaɾi a paŋʦaħ ko~uni a "ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan". o~urasaka, itija ħo~u misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan o~u taɬ~ɮatataʡakaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~u ko~uni, nano~u to~uʡas a rajraj ko~u tanəŋ a misaŋaʡ. itija ħo~u misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, o~u mama ko~u pasifanaʡaj to~u wawa, o~u mama ko~u papasifanaʡ to~u tanəŋ a mikaɬ~ɮo~ut, anini sato~u i, o~u səɾaɾ to~u ko~u pasifanaʡaj to~u tanəŋ mikaɬ~ɮo~ut. nano~u to~uʡas o~u panijaro~uʡ an no~u panʦaħ i, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u kasaʡaɾo~u no~u ɾo~uto~uk nai kaɾiŋko~u taŋasa i po~uso~uŋ ato~u miɾiɾisaj to~u rijar masanijaro~uʡaj. maro~uʡaj i pasawaɾi a paŋʦaħ i, misiiko~ur to~u ɾo~uto~uk misiʡajaw to~u rijar, miŋata to~u taj-pin-jaŋ, o~urasaka o~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj, ʦaajaj ka əɬ~ɮəŋ o~u i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u iraaj ko~u parijaraj a səraŋawan. o~u paŋʦaħ to~u i, o~u manmaan sakaʡo~urip, kakaənən, sakaɾaɾiʡaʦa maəmin miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u taɾiħo~uʦan. nika, o~u paŋʦaħ ħan mafanaʡ miaɾa to~u ʡao~uɾ, mato~u misaɾo~umaʡ, tajħaw, saso~uni a sapəŋpəŋ, ħaɾo~u "ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan " sakatajaɾ a maʡo~urip maəmin mafanaʡ miaɾa to~u ʡao~uɾ maɾo~u sakatajaɾ a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan. ano~u to~uo~urən ko~u pifo~utiŋ to~u rajraj, o~u miɾiɾisaj to~u rijar o~u taɬ~ɮa sakaʡo~urip ko~u pifo~utiŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, saka ʦaajaj ko~u sasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u ɾisin no~u pifo~utiŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak ato~u fo~utiŋ to~u. misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan maaɾa ko~u ʦəʦaj a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ʦəʦaj a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, to~usa, to~uɾo~u miħəʦa mafaɾiʦən to~u. misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, iʡajaw no~u ʦəʦaj a miħəʦa, taɾaɾo~uto~uk ko~u faʡinajan mipiɾiʡ to~u mo~uwatik ato~u fito~unaj a ʡao~uɾ, papo~uɾo~uŋ sa miaɾa to~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a pano~ukaj, ta patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħan mikəto~un ta ɾafo~uŋən i tafo~uk miʡiʦaŋ sakaʦa ka ŋəɾaʡ, ʦaka fao~u. pinapina to~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, aɾaən to~u i tafo~ukan, o~u po~uʡo~ut ko~u sapipo~uɬ~ɮaʦ, ro~uma a nijaro~u sapikajaŋan miɾiʡako~uŋ, no~u təɾaŋ ħo~u ko~u tanəŋ, ɬ~ɮo~uħɬ~ɮo~uħan a mitaraŋ, sarara sa, tatiiħ tataʡak ko~u namaɾ, patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən kaɾamkamən, sakaʦa ka to~uɬ~ɮo~uħ masijaw. saiko~uraj to~u satisiɾ ħan to~u mitəɾək, o~u ʡo~uwaj ko~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ, ro~uma sato~u miaɾa to~ukiɾaŋ no~u kamo~uraw maɾo~usakaɬ~ɮo~ut. paʦəfo~uŋ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan tanaməɬ~ɮ misakaɬ~ɮo~ukaɬ~ɮo~ut, ano~u ʦaka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u nəŋnəŋ o~u fanaʡ a misəɾiʦ, mato~u pakafitan to~u sakaɬ~ɮo~ut, taħiraən to~u nika faŋʦaaɾ to~u misakaɬ~ɮo~ukaɬ~ɮo~ut ko~u pisaɾo~uf. paʦəfo~uŋ maħərək masaŋaʡ ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, ira ko~u pasaɾo~uŋ paʦəfo~uŋ a ɾəkakawa. tinako~u to~u itiniaj i to~urik no~u paso~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, pinaħərək a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan itira i rijar no~u to~urik a paʦəfo~uŋ, aɾa sa to~u ɾimaaj a fataʦ no~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮ faɾo~uɬ~ɮħan maɾo~ufawaħan, sajʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ patəɾiən ko~u ʦəʦaj a taɾo~uɬ~ɮ, kaʡajaw i so~uta patəɾiən ko~u tamako~u ato~u ʡiʦəp sapato~uʡaja, sarakat o~u to~umo~uk ko~u mamikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾas mifətək misaaɾi nanaj ɾiħaɬ~ɮaj ko~u paʦəfo~uŋ, makaɬ~ɮo~ufa ko~u kinajra a fo~utiŋ, o~uja misaŋaaj to~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan a tamɬ~ɮaw ħaʦəʦaʦəʦaj sa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~uja fawaħan, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u mifaɾaħ to~uja kaaʦəkan a ɬ~ɮəmak, tatiiħ misiiko~ur a minəŋnəŋ. pakajni to~unini pisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u to~uʡas, o~u kawas no~u rijar ato~u kawas no~u ɾo~uto~uk paɾəməɬ~ɮən ko~uni paʦəfo~uŋ ato~u aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u fo~utiŋ. ano~u ħaratəŋən, ʦaka samaan ko~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, nika mikaɬ~ɮo~ut sato~u i ʦaaj ko~u kaħəmawaj, nawħan kaħəmaw maħakəɾo~uŋ no~u tapəɾik a maso~uno~uɾ, ano~u awaaj ko~u tanəŋ ato~u nafanafanʡan i, ʦaaj kafiɾo~u a mikaɬ~ɮo~ut, aniniaj sato~u no~u so~uka to~u ko~u sapisaŋaʡ, awaaj to~u maʡaraw ko~u no~u ʡao~uɾ, o~unini to~u ko~u sakaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u tanəŋ ato~u paʦəfo~uŋ a marajraj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, itini i pasawaɾi i kakaʦawan no~u po~uso~uŋ i **** a miħəʦaan pasaŋən a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u tataʡakaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u sijako~u, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u maɾaɾifətaj miʡiwas to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, pajtəmək sa ko~u kasanijaro~uʡ a misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, ɾaʦəʦaj sa pataɾaħəkaɾ to~u tanəŋ, nanaj to~uni kaɾaɾifət, maparajraj ko~u tanəŋ, ko~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan ato~u paʦəfo~uŋ, maparajraj ko~u taɬ~ɮaħəʦi no~u səraŋawan.
S.FORM: dadangoyan Maraod to ko saka 4 a folad tangasa i saka 6 a folad to mihecahecaan, pifotingan to kakahong no pasawali a pangcah koni a "dadangoyan". Orasaka, itiya ho misanga' to dadangoyan o tadatata'akay a demak no niyaro koni, nano to'as a rayray ko taneng a misanga'. Itiya ho misanga' to dadangoyan, o mama ko pasifana'ay to wawa, o mama ko papasifana' to taneng a mikadot, anini sato i, o selal to ko pasifana'ay to taneng mikadot. Nano to'as o paniyaro' an no Pancah i, midoedo to kasa'alo no lotok nai Kalingko tangasa i Posong ato mililisay to riyar masaniyaro'ay. Maro'ay i pasawali a Pangcah i, misiikor to lotok misi'ayaw to riyar, mingata to Tay-pin-yang, orasaka o Pangcah hananay, caayay ka edeng o i Fotoday ko iraay ko pariyaray a serangawan. o Pangcah to i, o manmaan saka'orip, kakaenen, sakalali'aca maemin milecad to talihocan. Nika, o Pangcah han mafana' miala to 'aol, mato misaloma', tayhaw, sasoni a sapengpeng, halo "dadangoyan " sakatayal a ma'orip maemin mafana' miala to 'aol malo sakatayal a lalosidan. ano tooren ko pifoting to rayray, o mililisay to riyar o tada saka'orip ko pifoting a demak, saka caayay ko sasawaden ko lisin no pifoting a demak ato foting to. Misanga' to dadangoyan Maala ko cecay a folad ko pisanga' to cecay a dadangoyan, tosa, tolo miheca mafalicen to. Misanga' to dadangoyan, i'ayaw no cecay a miheca, talalotok ko fa'inayan mipili' to mowatik ato fitonay a 'aol, papolong sa miala to matatodong a panokay, ta patatodong han miketon ta lafongen i tafok mi'icang sakaca ka ngela', caka fao. pinapina to a folad, alaen to i tafokan, o po'ot ko sapipodac, roma a niyaro sapikayangan mili'akong, no telang ho ko taneng, dohdohan a mitarang, sarara sa, tatiih tata'ak ko namal, patatodongen kalamkamen, sakaca ka todoh masiyaw. saikoray to satisil han to mitelek, o 'oway ko safalod, roma sato miala tokilang no kamoraw malosakadot. pacefong to dadangoyan tanamed misakadokadot, ano caka tatodong o nengneng o fana' a miselic, mato pakafitan to sakadot, tahiraen to nika fangcaal to misakadokadot ko pisalof. pacefong Maherek masanga' ko dadangoyan, ira ko pasalong pacefong a lekakawa. Tinako to itiniay i Torik no Pasong a niyaro', pinaherek a dadangoyan itira i riyar no Torik a pacefong, ala sa to limaay a fatac no talod falodhan malofawahan, saycomod patelien ko cecay a talod, ka'ayaw i sota patelien ko tamako ato 'icep sapato'aya, sarakat o Tomok ko mamikerid to kalas mifetek misaali nanay lihaday ko pacefong, makadofa ko kinayra a foting, oya misangaay toya dadangoyan a tamdaw hacecacecay sa micomod toya fawahan, todongay to mifalah toya kaacekan a demak, tatiih misiikor a minengneng. Pakayni tonini pisalongoc to to'as, o kawas no riyar ato kawas no lotok palemeden koni pacefong ato adihay ko foting. Ano haratengen, caka samaan ko pisanga' to dadangoyan, nika mikadot sato i caay ko kahemaway, nawhan kahemaw mahakelong no tapelik a masonol, ano awaay ko taneng ato nafanafan'an i, caay kafilo a mikadot, aniniay sato no soka to ko sapisanga', awaay to ma'araw ko no 'aol, Onini to ko sakalahedaw ko taneng ato pacefong a marayray ko demak, itini i pasawali i Kakacawan no Posong i 2005 a mihecaan pasangen a palowad no tata'akay a pitilidan no siyako, palowad to malalifetay mi'iwas to dadangoyan, paytemek sa ko kasaniyaro' a misanga' to dadangoyan, lacecay sa patalahekal to taneng, nanay toni kalalifet, maparayray ko taneng, ko pisanga' to dadangoyan ato pacefong, maparayray ko tadaheci no serangawan.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan marao~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ taŋasa i saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan, pifo~utiŋan to~u kakaħo~uŋ no~u pasawaɾi a paŋʦaħ ko~uni a "ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan". o~urasaka, itija ħo~u misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan o~u taɬ~ɮatataʡakaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~u ko~uni, nano~u to~uʡas a rajraj ko~u tanəŋ a misaŋaʡ. itija ħo~u misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, o~u mama ko~u pasifanaʡaj to~u wawa, o~u mama ko~u papasifanaʡ to~u tanəŋ a mikaɬ~ɮo~ut, anini sato~u i, o~u səɾaɾ to~u ko~u pasifanaʡaj to~u tanəŋ mikaɬ~ɮo~ut. nano~u to~uʡas o~u panijaro~uʡ an no~u panʦaħ i, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u kasaʡaɾo~u no~u ɾo~uto~uk nai kaɾiŋko~u taŋasa i po~uso~uŋ ato~u miɾiɾisaj to~u rijar masanijaro~uʡaj. maro~uʡaj i pasawaɾi a paŋʦaħ i, misiiko~ur to~u ɾo~uto~uk misiʡajaw to~u rijar, miŋata to~u taj-pin-jaŋ, o~urasaka o~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj, ʦaajaj ka əɬ~ɮəŋ o~u i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u iraaj ko~u parijaraj a səraŋawan. o~u paŋʦaħ to~u i, o~u manmaan sakaʡo~urip, kakaənən, sakaɾaɾiʡaʦa maəmin miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u taɾiħo~uʦan. nika, o~u paŋʦaħ ħan mafanaʡ miaɾa to~u ʡao~uɾ, mato~u misaɾo~umaʡ, tajħaw, saso~uni a sapəŋpəŋ, ħaɾo~u "ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan " sakatajaɾ a maʡo~urip maəmin mafanaʡ miaɾa to~u ʡao~uɾ maɾo~u sakatajaɾ a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan. ano~u to~uo~urən ko~u pifo~utiŋ to~u rajraj, o~u miɾiɾisaj to~u rijar o~u taɬ~ɮa sakaʡo~urip ko~u pifo~utiŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, saka ʦaajaj ko~u sasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u ɾisin no~u pifo~utiŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak ato~u fo~utiŋ to~u. misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan maaɾa ko~u ʦəʦaj a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ʦəʦaj a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, to~usa, to~uɾo~u miħəʦa mafaɾiʦən to~u. misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, iʡajaw no~u ʦəʦaj a miħəʦa, taɾaɾo~uto~uk ko~u faʡinajan mipiɾiʡ to~u mo~uwatik ato~u fito~unaj a ʡao~uɾ, papo~uɾo~uŋ sa miaɾa to~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a pano~ukaj, ta patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħan mikəto~un ta ɾafo~uŋən i tafo~uk miʡiʦaŋ sakaʦa ka ŋəɾaʡ, ʦaka fao~u. pinapina to~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, aɾaən to~u i tafo~ukan, o~u po~uʡo~ut ko~u sapipo~uɬ~ɮaʦ, ro~uma a nijaro~u sapikajaŋan miɾiʡako~uŋ, no~u təɾaŋ ħo~u ko~u tanəŋ, ɬ~ɮo~uħɬ~ɮo~uħan a mitaraŋ, sarara sa, tatiiħ tataʡak ko~u namaɾ, patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən kaɾamkamən, sakaʦa ka to~uɬ~ɮo~uħ masijaw. saiko~uraj to~u satisiɾ ħan to~u mitəɾək, o~u ʡo~uwaj ko~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ, ro~uma sato~u miaɾa to~ukiɾaŋ no~u kamo~uraw maɾo~usakaɬ~ɮo~ut. paʦəfo~uŋ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan tanaməɬ~ɮ misakaɬ~ɮo~ukaɬ~ɮo~ut, ano~u ʦaka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u nəŋnəŋ o~u fanaʡ a misəɾiʦ, mato~u pakafitan to~u sakaɬ~ɮo~ut, taħiraən to~u nika faŋʦaaɾ to~u misakaɬ~ɮo~ukaɬ~ɮo~ut ko~u pisaɾo~uf. paʦəfo~uŋ maħərək masaŋaʡ ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, ira ko~u pasaɾo~uŋ paʦəfo~uŋ a ɾəkakawa. tinako~u to~u itiniaj i to~urik no~u paso~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, pinaħərək a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan itira i rijar no~u to~urik a paʦəfo~uŋ, aɾa sa to~u ɾimaaj a fataʦ no~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮ faɾo~uɬ~ɮħan maɾo~ufawaħan, sajʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ patəɾiən ko~u ʦəʦaj a taɾo~uɬ~ɮ, kaʡajaw i so~uta patəɾiən ko~u tamako~u ato~u ʡiʦəp sapato~uʡaja, sarakat o~u to~umo~uk ko~u mamikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾas mifətək misaaɾi nanaj ɾiħaɬ~ɮaj ko~u paʦəfo~uŋ, makaɬ~ɮo~ufa ko~u kinajra a fo~utiŋ, o~uja misaŋaaj to~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan a tamɬ~ɮaw ħaʦəʦaʦəʦaj sa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~uja fawaħan, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u mifaɾaħ to~uja kaaʦəkan a ɬ~ɮəmak, tatiiħ misiiko~ur a minəŋnəŋ. pakajni to~unini pisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u to~uʡas, o~u kawas no~u rijar ato~u kawas no~u ɾo~uto~uk paɾəməɬ~ɮən ko~uni paʦəfo~uŋ ato~u aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u fo~utiŋ. ano~u ħaratəŋən, ʦaka samaan ko~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, nika mikaɬ~ɮo~ut sato~u i ʦaaj ko~u kaħəmawaj, nawħan kaħəmaw maħakəɾo~uŋ no~u tapəɾik a maso~uno~uɾ, ano~u awaaj ko~u tanəŋ ato~u nafanafanʡan i, ʦaaj kafiɾo~u a mikaɬ~ɮo~ut, aniniaj sato~u no~u so~uka to~u ko~u sapisaŋaʡ, awaaj to~u maʡaraw ko~u no~u ʡao~uɾ, o~unini to~u ko~u sakaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u tanəŋ ato~u paʦəfo~uŋ a marajraj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, itini i pasawaɾi i kakaʦawan no~u po~uso~uŋ i **** a miħəʦaan pasaŋən a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u tataʡakaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u sijako~u, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u maɾaɾifətaj miʡiwas to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, pajtəmək sa ko~u kasanijaro~uʡ a misaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, ɾaʦəʦaj sa pataɾaħəkaɾ to~u tanəŋ, nanaj to~uni kaɾaɾifət, maparajraj ko~u tanəŋ, ko~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan ato~u paʦəfo~uŋ, maparajraj ko~u taɬ~ɮaħəʦi no~u səraŋawan.
